chapter_title.en: Chapter 40 – What Obligates the complete dower

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (1/185)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (1/185)
text: إِذَا الْتَقَى الْخِتَانَانِ وَجَبَ الْمَهْرُ وَ الْعِدَّةُ وَ الْغُسْلُ .

en.hubeali: Ali, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Hafs Bin Al Bakhtary,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘When the two circumcisions meet, it Obligates the dower, and the waiting period, and the washing’.
en.sarwar: 2. Ali has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Hafs ibn al-Bakhtariy who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘When the two organs meet, mahr (dower), waiting period and Ghusl (bath) become obligatory.’”
